mapper.insert: insert into feedbacks (ticket_no, report_url, report_type, form_content, email, user_agent, ip) values (#{ticketNo}, #{reportUrl}, #{reportType}, #{formContentJson}, #{email}, #{userAgent}, #{ip})
mapper.select: select * from feedbacks where ticket_no = #{ticketNo} and deleted_at is null
select * from feedbacks where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
mapper.update: update feedbacks set status = #{status}, admin_reply = #{reply}, reply_time = case when #{reply} <> '' then current_timestamp else reply_time end where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update feedbacks set deleted_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select value_text from settings where key_name = 'basic.author_email'
